frothy connect — open the human REPL over serial

Connect is Frothy's human REPL over serial. Use it to type at a running board and read replies, with line history and a status probe that retries while the board is waking. For one-shot delivery of a file, use send. Editors use session instead.

Examples:
  frothy connect --port /dev/cu.usbserial-0001
      open the human REPL on the board on that port

Flags:
  -baud int
    	serial baud rate (default 115200)
  -history-file string
    	override history file path (default $XDG_DATA_HOME/frothy/history)
  -no-history
    	disable history read/write
  -port string
    	serial port, for example /dev/cu.usbmodem101
  -settle duration
    	delay after opening serial
  -takeover
    	stop another frothy holding the port before connecting
  -timeout duration
    	serial prompt timeout (default 5s)
